projectHomeIntro: Keep photos, facts, market evidence and listings in one trustworthy project per item.
noProjectsHint: Create your first project to analyze, value and prepare the listing.
followUpFoundation: Track the item state here. Time-based coaching and sale outcomes are expanded in the next milestone.
projectRecoveryIntro: Legacy data could not be migrated safely. Nothing was overwritten. Export a backup or reset selected data below.
homeCoach_draft: Complete item facts and photo evidence
homeCoach_paused: Decide whether to adjust price, photos, or listing
coachSafetyReason: Testing or authenticity status is missing for this category.
coachSafetyImpact: Reduces the risk of a misleading listing.
coachFactsReason: Required facts are missing or still unknown.
coachFactsImpact: Improves search matches, pricing evidence, and listing copy.
coachPhotosReason: The shot list is incomplete or a local quality check found issues.
coachPhotosImpact: Makes condition clearer and reduces avoidable questions.
coachComparablesReason: You have approved fewer than two realized prices.
coachComparablesImpact: Produces reproducible pricing instead of a guess.
coachPriceReason: The project does not yet have a sufficiently supported valuation.
coachPriceImpact: Shows exactly what affects the recommended price.
coachListingReason: There is no editable listing draft yet.
coachListingImpact: Prepares the project for manual publishing.
coachFollow-upReason: The project is listed and needs a current outcome.
coachFollow-upImpact: Helps choose the next action and improves local history.
photoIssue_crop_risk: May be heavily cropped in a square preview
imageAssessmentError: The photo was added, but its quality check could not run.
heicNotSupported: HEIC/HEIF is not supported in v2.0. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
factCandidatesIntro: Suggestions are evidence. They never replace your locked corrections.
knowledgeGap_brand: The brand could not be established from the evidence.
knowledgeGap_model: The model could not be established from the evidence.
knowledgeGap_condition: The seller must review the condition.
knowledgeGap_attributes: No category-specific attributes could be established.
subtitle: Value items faster with guided analysis, pricing strategy, and marketplace-ready listings.
comparableQueryPlanIntro: Exact and broad searches are built from reviewed facts. Your edits are preserved.
askingPriceNeverAnchors: Shown only as market context and never affects the numeric price.
valuationEffectExcluded: Market context — does not affect valuation
title: Title
confirmReplaceUserListingText: Replace every user-edited listing field with new suggestions?
sellPlanReason_time: Your time preference maps to the {{pricingStrategy}} pricing strategy.
sellPlanReason_evidence: The evidence contains {{count}} user-approved realized comparables.
sellPlanReason_fulfillment_size: Item size makes pickup the clearest option.
sellPlanReason_fulfillment_flexibility: Shipping or pickup gives a private seller flexible reach.
sellPlanReason_insufficient: Price remains blocked until enough realized evidence is approved.
generateListingsForSellPlan: Generate listing drafts after pricing to receive a sell plan.
transientFallback: Use offline analysis for temporary network, timeout, or capacity failures
providerLocalStatus: local endpoint is checked during analysis
onboardingIntro: Choose how analysis should run. Offline is the safe default and needs no account or network.
onboardingPrivacyConsent: You can change this later. Cloud data is sent only when Gemini is actively selected; backups never contain API keys.
privacy_offline: All analysis stays on this device and uses deterministic rules. No images or text leave your computer.
privacy_ollama: Text and up to three images are sent only to Ollama on localhost:11434.
privacy_gemini: Text and up to two images are sent to Google Gemini when you start an analysis.
imageLimitError: You can use at most {{count}} images.
imageTypeError: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP are supported.
imageSizeError: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
imageProcessingError: The image could not be processed.
secretSaved: Saved securely — enter a new value to replace
secretMigrationFailed: An older API key could not be moved to protected storage. It was kept unchanged so you can retry after unlocking your system keyring.
secureStorageUnavailable: Protected system storage is unavailable. Unlock or configure your system keyring before saving cloud API keys.
providerPrivacyNote: Gemini sends item text and up to two images to Google. Ollama uses localhost:11434 only. Offline sends nothing.
backupPrivacyNote: Backups contain reviewed local data but never API keys or protected secrets.
confirmImport: Validate and replace the selected local datasets?
confirmReset: Permanently reset the selected local datasets?
backupImported: Backup imported. Restart the app to load restored data.
backupInvalid: The backup was invalid. No data was changed.
dataResetComplete: Selected data was reset. Restart the app to refresh all views.
dataReadFailed: Local data is corrupt or uses an unsupported version. Existing data was not overwritten.
reviewBlocked: Review blocked: fix critical policy issues before copying.
resumeDraftPrompt: An unfinished draft was found. Resume where you left off?
resumeDraftConflictPrompt: A draft was found, but you also have current unsaved changes.
